docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-15-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-13-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ANA LINARES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT VICTORIA MOSQUERA IS PRESENT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY LINARES, ANA AS TO DEFENDANT MOSQUERA, VICTORIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-15-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. MATTER CONTINUED TO AUGUST 13, 2021 AT 8:30 A.M. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
REMARK: CASE FILE RETAINED IN THE COURTROOM FOR HEARING ON 8-13-21 @ 8:30 A.M.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
